description_long: This object is a Little Caesars gift card mounted on a branded cardboard backing. The front features a cartoon mascot with a leafy headdress, the Little Caesars logo, and a $20 denomination, along with an image of a pepperoni pizza slice being pulled away, showing melted cheese. The back of the card displays bold text reading 'HOT-N-READY' and 'CHAUD ET PRETE!', a barcode, and additional product information in both English and French. The card and backing are die-cut with a slot for hanging on a retail display. The overall appearance is glossy and colorful, with orange and white as dominant colors and photographic pizza imagery. The card is thin and lightweight, typical of retail gift cards.
description: A Little Caesars $20 gift card on a branded cardboard backing, featuring a cartoon mascot and a photo of a pepperoni pizza slice with melted cheese.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cartoon mascot, Little Caesars logo, $20 value, and a photo of a pepperoni pizza slice.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the card and backing, with the front graphics partially visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the 'HOT-N-READY' slogan, barcode, and product information in black and white.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and partial front graphics.
